title: stelis nycterina
intro: Stelis nycterina, a rare and lesser-known orchid species, is a type of flowering plant that is native to tropical forests in Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis nycterina include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Stelis nycterina typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
